reviews_5s:
I love love my apothecary bottles! They are gorgeous, well made and I love the colors. Exactly what I was looking for and the price for all three was great! I’m looking forward to dressing them and filling them up with goodness.Nice little bottlesGreat for decorating, super cute, and great quality. Very happy with this purchase.Color is good. Thick glassThey are very beautiful as shown in photosI bought these as a gift for my bookclub after reading “The Lost Apothecary”. I love them and they will, too! Great to decorate for a table.Bottles are even prettier in person!Nice quality, and sturdy. Item is exactly as described.Really like price & look!
